title: WarningOn Property, Spel Class
syntax:
ReadOnly Property WarningOn As Boolean

Type

Boolean
description: Returns status of the controller warning state.
see_also:
ErrorOn

EStopOn

PauseOn

SafetyOn

WarningOn Example

VB Example:

If m_spel.WarningOn Then

    lblWarningStatus.Text = "ON"

Else

    lblWarningStatus.Text = "OFF"

End If

C# Example:

if (m_spel.WarningOn)

   lblWarningStatus.Text = "ON";

else

   lblWarningStatus.Text = "OFF";
examples:
If m_spel.WarningOn Then
    lblWarningStatus.Text = "ON"
Else
    lblWarningStatus.Text = "OFF"
End If
